name: chronicle
description: The Chronicle app itself · being rebuilt on React + shadcn with a full redesign on the Weave design system.

stages.title: Part 1 — Foundations (no designs needed)
stages.note: engine and plumbing; each ends with a signed tag

phases.name: The new toolchain
phases.desc: React + Vite + every shadcn/Kibo component, themed from the Weave design system; the app builds and runs both ways.
items: Vite + React + every shadcn and Kibo component, themed from the Weave tokens.
Tauri serves the dev server in dev and the built bundle in release.
A typed bridge for every backend command.

phases.name: Trust and safety
phases.desc: The app can only read the folders you opened; roadmap sessions ask consent and can be cancelled; nothing outlives the window.
items: Roadmap sessions ask consent first and can be cancelled.
The app can only read folders you opened.
Nothing outlives the window — every child process is stopped and cleaned up.

phases.name: One-click helpers
phases.desc: Switch branch, clean up workspaces, and file freshness checks become real actions instead of copied commands.
items: Switch branch and clean up workspaces become real buttons.
The file reader learns size, freshness, and file kind.

phases.name: Honest rules
phases.desc: A roadmap rule that can't be checked now says so; the rule engine is tested against a fixture project.
items: A rule that can't be checked says so instead of silently failing.
The rule engine is tested against a fixture project.
This roadmap file itself was rewritten to track the rebuild.

phases.name: The kanban engine
phases.desc: Task storage, image attachments, and the session that turns queued tasks into a fix plan.
items: Tasks and screenshots live inside the project and travel with it.
'Ready to execute' turns queued tasks into a fix plan the roadmap can track.

stages.title: Part 2 — The design batch
stages.note: every screen is drawn before any is built

phases.name: All 30 screens get drawn
phases.desc: The full redesign — picker, sidebar, roadmap, repo, terminal, and the new kanban — drawn in Claude Design on the Weave design system.

paste.when: run the whole file as one batch

stages.title: Part 3 — The build (needs the designs back)
stages.note: one slice at a time: build · review · wire · review the wiring

phases.name: Launch screen and dialogs
phases.desc: The picker, the project switcher, confirms, toasts, and the shortcuts overlay.
items: The launch screen with live recents.
The project switcher, confirms, toasts, and the shortcuts overlay.

phases.name: The window frame and sidebar
phases.desc: Project tabs, the new icon sidebar, and the live status header.
items: Project tabs and the icon sidebar.
The live status header and the resizable terminal column.

phases.name: The roadmap
phases.desc: Current state, what needs you, the phase timeline, and the consent-first roadmap builder.
items: The current state, what needs you, and the phase timeline.
The consent-first roadmap builder with a visible cancel.
The full phase view with its documents and saves.

phases.name: Phase detail
phases.desc: The full phase view with its documents and saves — plus the one-click Start this phase button.

phases.name: Files and history
phases.desc: The file tree, the reader with live freshness, and the plain-language history pane.
items: The file tree with live change markers.
The reader that notices when a file changes on disk.
The plain-language history pane.

phases.name: Terminals
phases.desc: The terminal tabs and agent start buttons, rebuilt.
items: Terminal tabs that survive switching views.
One-click agent starts.

phases.name: The kanban
phases.desc: The four-column board: write tasks, attach screenshots, and turn a round into a fix plan on the roadmap.
items: The four-column board: write tasks, attach screenshots.
Turn a round into a fix plan that appears on the roadmap.

phases.name: Ship it
phases.desc: Final cleanup, the full walkthrough of every journey, and the merge back to main.
items: The full walkthrough of every journey.
Merge back to main.
